description: Example: family trip to Paris in July with budget

input.query: I want to travel to Paris for 5 days in July with my family, budget around €3000

output.name: constraint_agent
output.description: Constraint extraction for: I want to travel to Paris for 5 days in July with my family, budget around €3000

content.query: I want to travel to Paris for 5 days in July with my family, budget around €3000

hard_constraints.text: Transport: Flight (added by user when prompted)
Accommodation: Hotel (added by user when prompted)

commonsense_constraints.text: The trip start date must be in the future.
The trip end date must be after the trip start date.
The trip must last at least one full day.
Hotel check-in must be scheduled after the arrival transport reaches the destination.
Hotel check-out must be scheduled before or at the time of the departure transport.
